author: @retrospectre2658
text:
Ok, this is going to sound crazy but go with me on this. What if theyre clones? Or engineered?

Now, in the Epstein files there's a high level doctor that keeps talking about genetic engineering and cloning. Even says a few times about how its his dream to completely clone a full human. 

If you were an up and coming doctor, how do you test this? You cannot incubate an embryo in a vial. But you CAN implant it in a surrogate body. Like a couple who cant conceive.

Also, Jeffery was fixated on breeding a class of people who were gay, trans, smooth bodied and even didnt really change much during puberty. The way that would happen in males is a testosterone blocker. There's a genetic disorder that actually ups the estrogen in male bodies naturally, causes them to look more feminine and thin, but also causes them to have deep problems with chemical depression, body dysmorphia, and even delusions of grandeur. This is an actual, real, genetic condition. 

So, what if these guys are being activated because they've been watched their whole lives? Now, Im talking about Crooks and the zero online kids specifically. Not Tyler Robinson. I think he's just a patsy.

But assume I'm right. Now think of how Crooks' parents were ALLOWED to completely scrub his house, wipe it with alcohol, and even replaced the silverware. And his body was incinerated within days of his death, the roof was scrubbed even before forensics was done. Why are they so scared of his genetics being tested?
